title: Apollo, Bpifrance, SBI part of $175m fundraise for DeFi lending protocol Morpho
message_html: Apollo, Bpifrance, SBI part of $175m fundraise for DeFi lending protocol Morpho ...
snippet: Morpho Association, which supports the Morpho DeFi lending protocol, has raised $175 million in a round co-led by Paradigm, a16z crypto and Ribbit Capital. Strategic investors include Apollo Funds, Circle Ventures, VanEck and Ledger Cathay, alongside Variant, Wintermute Ventures, Prelude, IOSG, Hash

title: Top Japanese banks plot stablecoin rollout
snippet: Three of Japan's top banks have joined forces to issue a Yen-backed stablecoin in 2026.
